# kIOInterruptTypePCIMessaged

**Enumeration Case**

A message signaled interrupt (MSI) type for a PCI device.

## Declaration

```swift
kIOInterruptTypePCIMessaged
```

## Types

- **kIOInterruptTypePCIMessagedX**: An extended message signal interrupt (MSI-X) type for a PCI device.
